FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Viewbox

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI Viewbox: scales its single child by a composited transform (no relayout). WinUI computes the scale from a layout measure pass; this engine has no measure-override seam on BoxEl, so the scale is supplied either as an explicit factor (the scale overload) or computed from a known content size and target box via ViewboxStretch/ViewboxStretchDirection logic (the sized overload). The child is wrapped in a centered BoxEl carrying a uniform ScaleX/ScaleY.

public static class Viewbox

Methods

Create(Element, float)

Explicit-factor Viewbox (no layout measure): scales the child uniformly by scale×.

public static BoxEl Create(Element child, float scale = 1.5)

Parameters

child Element
scale float

Returns

BoxEl

Create(Element, float, float, float, float, ViewboxStretch, ViewboxStretchDirection)

WinUI-faithful Viewbox: computes the scale from the child's natural size and a target box, applying stretch and stretchDirection. (Sizes are caller-supplied because the engine exposes no measure-override seam — see the design note in the type summary.)

public static BoxEl Create(Element child, float contentWidth, float contentHeight, float availableWidth, float availableHeight, ViewboxStretch stretch = ViewboxStretch.Uniform, ViewboxStretchDirection stretchDirection = ViewboxStretchDirection.Both)

Parameters

child Element
contentWidth float
contentHeight float
availableWidth float
availableHeight float
stretch ViewboxStretch
stretchDirection ViewboxStretchDirection

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
